reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Okay, but be careful about what fuel they put in. Maybe I was unlucky or careless (or maybe they tried, since I was a tourist), but instead of giving me the Super, they gave me the Infinia, which costs significantly more and practically no one buys. When I complained, I was told they'd asked me, but that wasn't the case (they just asked if I paid by card or cash).

(Original)
Ok, ma attenzione a che carburante mettono. Sarò stato sfortunato o poco attento io (o visto che ero un turista ci hanno provato) ma invece di mettermi la Super mi hanno messo l'Infinia, che costa notevolmente di più e praticamente non la compra nessuno. Alle mie rimostranze mi è stato detto che me lo avevano chiesto ma non è stato così (mi è stato solo chiesto se pagavo con carta o contanti)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCOWJiT3FBRRAB

reviews.comment:
No sean RATAS... UN sólo empleado atendiendo a todo el pueblo... buen lugar, lindo, pero el pobre empleado no puede hacer magia y se amontona la gente

(Translated by Google)
Don't be RATS... ONE employee serving the entire town... nice place, nice, but the poor employee can't do magic and people crowd together.
